mission.title: podman-container-tools: Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive remote podman.sock
mission.description: Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive remote podman.sock. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for error: ````Error: Failed to create sshClient: Connection to bastion host (ssh://ben@192.168.2.186:22/run/user/1000/podman/podman`

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

**Description**

Trying to run Podman on a remote machine and use the podman-remote client to drive it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over ssh to drive…
steps.description:
```
$ podman --log-level=debug ps                                                                                                    [9:59:16]
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called ps.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug ps)
DEBU[0000] Found SSH_AUTH_SOCK
```yaml
**Describe the results you expected:**

I expected `podman-remote ps` to behave normally, outputting something like this:
```

steps.title: Confirm Unable to authenticate with podman-remote over… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that ````Error: Failed to create sshClient: Connection to bastion host (ssh://ben@192.168.2.186:22/run/user/1000/podman/podman` no longer appears.

resolution.summary:
```
$ podman --log-level=debug ps                                                                                                    [9:59:16]
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called ps.PersistentPreRunE(podman --log-level=debug ps)
DEBU[0000] Found SSH_AUTH_SOCK "/private/tmp/com.apple.launchd.VBspeEuRIU/Listeners", ssh-agent signer enabled
Error: Failed to create
codeSnippets:

I expected `podman-remote ps` to behave normally, outputting something like this:

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
